work.title: Data Scientist Masterarbeit
work.location: BMW & Deutsches Forschungszentrum für Künstliche Intelligenz (DFKI)
work.description: **Topic**: *Evaluating Multi-Turn Tool-Using Agentic RAG Systems: A Synthetic Benchmark Generation Approach*. Architected a modular evaluation framework for **tool-using Agentic RAG systems** to enable fine-grained failure localization. Built a **multi-turn synthetic benchmark** that combines deterministic **task planning** with diverse user **personas**. Engineered an **unsupervised retrieval engine** to audit a **RAG system** over **4M unannotated** corporate records.

work.title: Data Scientist Werkstudent
work.description: Developed a **KG-RAG** over unstructured technical documentation and a **Planning Agent**, using **LangChain** and **HuggingFace**. Implemented an **Autoencoder** model for **Anomaly Detection via Federated Learning** across edge devices. Developed a **Digital Twin** system using **PLCs**, **MQTT** and **Node-red**. Built an **MCP** bridge to connect natural language queries to a live database via an agent.

work.title: Cloud Software Engineer
work.description: Worked on the **Oracle Cloud Infrastructure** in the team of Big **Data Service** in **Oracle Analytics**. Developed tools for managing and deploying **big data clusters**.  Developed several Pipelines for workflow automation and testing, reducing manual efforts and increasing testing coverage.

work.title: Data Analyst Intern
work.description: Developed a high-accuracy **algorithm** for **detecting external battery replacements**. Resolved the issue of **missing database values** and implemented a **pipeline** to forward fill the gaps, **boosting service demand by 62%**. Designed a **Streamlit dashboard** to adjust prediction model parameters and obtain **real-time output** (**<8 seconds**) Configured **cloud-based environments** for working with **PySpark**. Applied various **visualization and data analytics** techniques to gain insights from **diverse data sources**. Identified **data patterns** in failing vehicle components and leveraged this information to **perform recalls only the impacted vehicles**.

work.title: Site Reliability Engineer
work.description: **Maintained** over 10 servers, **monitored** services and **enhanced** engineering processes. Built a **platform** to manage client **APIs** with payments and a subscription system using **NextJS**, **Stripe** and **Docker**. Maintained a **text analytics** model for message categorization, benefiting clients.

work.title: Production Engineering Fellow
work.description: Selected among 120 out of 20,000 applicants. Automated a **CI/CD** workflow using **GitHub Actions** for efficient deployment to a production server. Implemented app monitoring with **cAdvisor**, **Prometheus** and **Grafana**. Ensured **99.99% uptime** hosting it in a **Docker** container on a **AWS EC2** instance.

work.title: Data Engineer
work.description: Used mathematical and statistical technics over data to get the most important **features** and create ML models that generate **predictions** as well as valuable insights. Created ML analysis pipeline endpoints using **Flask**.

work.title: Full Stack Developer
work.description: Developed a platform for **COVID tracking**, a **Marketplace** site and an **ERP** platform that can organize inventory, human resources shipments, income and expenses. Used **Angular + Capacitor**, **Typescript**, **Cordova**, **SQL** and **Flask**.

education.title: MSc. Data Science and Artificial Intelligence
education.description: Coursing degree. **Key Coursework:** _Statistics | ML Cybersecurity | NLP | Machine Translation | Image Processing & Computer Vision_. **Master Thesis (Grade 1.0):** Evaluating Multi-Turn Agentic RAG Systems (In collaboration with BMW & DFKI).

education.title: BSc. Computer Science
education.description: Grade: 94.6 / 100. Five times best software engineering GPA. **60% tuition** scholarship due to academic merit. **Key Coursework:** _ML | Time series | Algoriths & Optimization | Cloud Computing & Distributed | Automation & PLC | Vehicle User Interfaces_

education.title: Computer Science Exchange Student
education.description: **Full scholarship** recipient from **DAAD**. **Key Coursework:** _Computer Vision II | Autonomous Driving and Assistance Systems | Statistics_

education.title: Technologist in Automation and Robotics
education.description: **Thesis Project:** Built an Autonomous Tennis Machine using **power & digital electronics** and a **microcontroller**. **Key Coursework:** _Electronics, Robotics and Industrial Automation, Electricity, Instrumentation, PLCs and System Design_.
